name: claumon
description: Live Claude Code usage, cost, and session monitor in your status bar and a dashboard panel, powered by a running claumon server.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Claumon makes network requests to the configured host and embeds it in a webview, so it stays disabled until the workspace is trusted.

claumon.host.description: Hostname where the claumon server is running. Machine-scoped: cannot be set per-workspace, so an untrusted repo cannot redirect the extension to another host.

claumon.port.description: Port where the claumon server is listening. Machine-scoped: cannot be set per-workspace.

claumon.statusBar.metric.description: Which usage metric to show in the status bar item.
